Bespoke Engraving · Perth, Western Australia

Your name,
forever
engraved.

Personalised engraving on perfumes, makeup, and beauty products. Every piece tells a story — yours.

Discover the craft

What we do

Engraving services

Precision laser engraving on the most beloved beauty pieces — turning everyday luxuries into lifelong keepsakes.

01

Perfume Bottles

Names, initials, dates, or short messages etched onto glass or metal perfume flacons. Perfect for gifting or personal milestones.

02

Makeup Compacts

Personalise lipsticks, compacts, powder cases, and palettes. Transform a daily essential into something truly yours.

03

Gift Engraving

Looking for the perfect gift? We engrave beauty products to mark birthdays, anniversaries, graduations, and special occasions.

"Every line etched is a memory made permanent."

Our story

Crafted with care,
made to last.

At Studio Zaffiro, we believe beauty products deserve to be more than beautiful — they deserve to be meaningful. Our engraving service blends artisan precision with a deep love for the personal details that make a gift unforgettable.

Based in Perth, Western Australia, we work with perfumes, makeup, and beauty accessories, bringing your words and designs to life with fine, lasting detail.

Studio Zaffiro

How it works

Simple. Personal.
Unforgettable.

Two ways to get your piece engraved — whatever works best for you.

Option 01

Drop-off
& Pick-up

Step 01

Get in touch

Message us on Instagram, WhatsApp, or email to discuss your engraving idea and arrange a drop-off time.

Step 02

Drop off your piece

Bring your product to us and we'll take care of the rest.

Step 03

Pick up in 24 hours

Your beautifully engraved piece will be ready to collect within 24 hours.

Option 02

Live Engraving
at Events

Want something truly special at your event? We bring the engraving studio to you — live, on the spot, in front of your guests.

Perfect for brand activations, pop-ups, bridal showers, corporate events, markets, and more. Guests watch their piece come to life in real time — an experience they'll never forget.

Enquire via WhatsApp or Instagram →
